note: task writes a strategic full-site design-brief doc, not CSS/theming tokens — no existing layer value covers cross-cutting IA/design planning output

pure root-level docs sync (CLAUDE.md/README.md) with no code change has no good layer fit — ui/page/api/hook/lib/style/db all imply source code; harness chosen as closest (meta/non-runtime housekeeping) but this task does not touch .harness/**

pure operational vercel --prod deploy trigger, no code diff at all (scope []) — no source layer fits; harness chosen as closest meta/non-runtime bucket though this task does not touch .harness/** either

running a CLI deploy command is an operational action, not an edit to an env/build/config FILE — config chosen as closest since none of style/docs/component/endpoint/bugfix/feature/data-migration/refactor fit an ops-only deploy trigger
